review_title: Highly secure document collaboration and approvals tool that is simple to use and administer
description: Excellent - a well thought out package of secure and easy to use collaboration tools that can flexibly model your security processes while fitting in with your client's processes
author: John D.
pros: Ticks all the boxes for sharing classified or sensitive documents with my security conscious clients - E2E encryption, data sovereignty provisions Easy to use / manage - Cloud based, Web based (no plugins), transparent encryption key management Integrated video conference, chat, email with same secure E2E encryption is a real bonus.
cons: It does what I was looking for and more. The only problem larger companies might find is that the capabilities may overlap with others you aleady have - e.g., video conferencing, chat - you will need to decide when/how you will use these capabilies.

review_title: DekkoPro: An essential secure application for any business.
description: The multiple tools in one application are a feature not offered by other solutions.
author: Arun S.
pros: No expertise is needed in the installation process. Updates are automatic. Your collaborative partner has to abide by your security protocols. Spam cannot get through.
cons: The tradeoff is security or features. Other applications are sometimes easier to use, but they cannot guarantee security.

description: Excellent, confidential documents can be shared irrespective of size.
author: sean M.
pros: Ease of deployment across the company, Ease of use.
cons: No App for Phone use when travelling out of office.

description: Great experience with the product and the company!
author: John R.
pros: The ease of use and multi function capability in one product really helps my team.
cons: We'd like to see more features added to Lynx the video conference tool.

review_title: Bullet proof security at a budget price
description: The products we explored with similar security levels were costly and complex. Dekko was very competitively priced, and so easy to implement. A no brainer!
author: Russell C.
pros: Top notch security but still easy to use.
cons: Can't think of anything right now, it just works. End of story move on.

author: Rick H.
pros: Find it very simple and easy to share large files and sign documents. Love that there is no limit on file size or type. Encryption is super important for us as we're a payment company and dealing with highly confidential info
cons: There wasn't anything I didn't like. User friendly and gets the job done!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent, highly secure, easy to use product
author: Quentin R.
pros: The product was very easy to use and highly secure. There isn't anything to download and has a proven track record as evidenced by use by Government authorities.
cons: I have not experienced any negative features when using the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Paul M.
pros: Easy functional to use and secure at a good price
cons: Like everything takes a while to learn functionality but otherwsie all good
